allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('src/problems/InsertInterval/InsertIntervalVisualizer.jsx', 'utf8'\); console.log\('File size:', code.length, 'bytes'\); console.log\('Contains DockableWorkspace:', code.includes\('DockableWorkspace'\)\); console.log\('Contains FloatingPanel:', code.includes\('FloatingPanel'\)\); console.log\('Contains useAutoScroll:', code.includes\('useAutoScroll'\)\); console.log\('Contains IntervalVisualization:', code.includes\('IntervalVisualization'\)\);")
PowerShell(npx vite build --logLevel error; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Host "Exit code: $exitCode"; if \($exitCode -eq 0\) { Write-Host "Build successful" } else { Write-Host "Build failed" })
